chapter_title.en: The Rules of Forgetfulness (sahw) in Prayer

text: 994 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «سَجْدَتَا اَلسَّهْوِ بَعْدَ اَلتَّسْلِيمِ وَ قَبْلَ اَلْكَلاَمِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.994 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"The two prostrations of forgetfulness (Sajdah al-Sahw) are after the Tasleem (salutation) and before speaking."
